headline: The Key to a Long Lifecycle: How Doug Burds Drives Circularity in HVAC
summary: After 30 years at Trane Technologies, Doug Burds helps customers rethink replacement. Through renewal, remanufacturing and proactive service, he extends equipment life and drives circular impact across North America. NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire ...

headline: How is Modine Becoming a Higher-Quality Stock Than Before?
summary: MOD's shift toward higher-margin climate solutions and data center cooling is driving growth, raising its profile beyond cyclical peers.
